notes: Russian Malachite ERA. New generation with improved tandem charge defeat capability vs Relikt. ~2.0x vs KE, ~3.0x vs HEAT. Multi-layer design with optimized initiation sequence to disrupt tandem warheads. Fielded on T-14 Armata, T-15, T-90M. Reduced collateral damage vs older ERA (lighter, less side effect). BHN is placeholder — ERA does not have Brinell hardness.

source.reference: Open-source Russian armor analysis, T-14/T-15 Armata publications
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from reported Malachite ERA performance: ~2.0x vs KE per Russian technical claims. Density approximate for optimized tandem-defeat cassette design.
